tagline: A purpose-driven home care franchise built on culture with proven financials and a growing senior market tailwind.
description_short: FirstLight Home Care is a non-medical and medical in-home care franchise operating under an engaged owner-operator model requiring a minimum of 30 hours per week. With 284 territories across the U.S. Item 19 data shows 1.7M average gross revenue for mature units and a 211B total addressable market making this brand a scalable recession-resistant business in one of the fastest-growing sectors in franchising.
market_intelligence_insight: U.S. senior home care market valued at approximately 211B with 10000 Americans turning 65 daily and 90% of seniors preferring to age in place. Demand expected to accelerate through 2030 as adults 65+ will represent over 20% of the U.S. population driving sustained growth in in-home care services.
item_19_headline: Mature territories open 37 or more months average 1.72M in annual gross revenue.
ongoing_support: field visits,weekly phone coaching,dedicated launch specialist,LMS platform,national alliances,regional meetings,technology suite
